## ⚠️ Please Read Before Submitting / 提交前请阅读

> [!IMPORTANT]
> **PRs are welcome, but please open an Issue first to discuss the approach.**
> **欢迎提交 PR，但请先开 Issue 讨论方案。**

All contributions must be discussed in an Issue before a PR is opened. Undiscussed PRs will be closed without review.

所有贡献必须先在 Issue 中讨论，未经讨论的 PR 将直接关闭，不予审查。

→ [Open an Issue](https://github.com/AnalyseDeCircuit/oxideterm/issues/new)

---

### 🔌 Have a feature idea? Write a plugin! / 有新功能需求？请尝试编写插件！

OxideTerm has a runtime plugin system that supports custom extensions without modifying the core codebase.

OxideTerm 拥有运行时插件系统，无需修改核心代码即可实现自定义扩展。

→ [Plugin Development Guide](https://github.com/AnalyseDeCircuit/OxideTerm/blob/main/docs/reference/PLUGIN_DEVELOPMENT.md)

---

*Thank you for your interest in OxideTerm! / 感谢你对 OxideTerm 的关注！*
